new_world_explorer_ev_001.title: Favorable Map
new_world_explorer_ev_001.body: A navigator returns with a clear map. The coast becomes easier to control.

new_world_explorer_ev_002.title: Well-Filled Hold
new_world_explorer_ev_002.body: A convoy returns with heavy crates and even heavier smiles.

new_world_explorer_ev_003.title: Poorly Received Mission
new_world_explorer_ev_003.body: Some preachers speak too quickly and listen too little. The village closes itself off.

new_world_explorer_ev_004.title: Letter from the Palace
new_world_explorer_ev_004.body: The court praises your latest results. For once, the royal seal brings something other than an order.

new_world_explorer_ev_005.title: Disputed Frontier
new_world_explorer_ev_005.body: A neighboring chief challenges our boundary markers. Our lands suddenly seem much less secure.

new_world_explorer_ev_006.title: Harbor Chapel
new_world_explorer_ev_006.body: A small chapel opens near the dock. Sermons spread as quickly as rumors.

new_world_explorer_ev_007.title: Plundered Convoy
new_world_explorer_ev_007.body: Part of the stock disappears on the inland road. Trade hates this kind of surprise.

new_world_explorer_ev_008.title: Displeased court
new_world_explorer_ev_008.body: A report arrives late and with too many excuses. The palace likes delays even less than the truth.

new_world_explorer_ev_009.title: Applauded Preacher
new_world_explorer_ev_009.body: A preacher knows how to speak simply. Crowds stay until the end and return the next day.

new_world_explorer_ev_010.title: Profitable Vein
new_world_explorer_ev_010.body: A discreet vein begins to yield more than expected. Even the scribes seem pleased.

new_world_explorer_ev_011.title: Conflicting Orders
new_world_explorer_ev_011.body: Two royal messages say two opposite things. You lose time, and the court loses patience.

new_world_explorer_ev_012.title: Announced Visit
new_world_explorer_ev_012.body: An envoy of the king speaks of your colony as an example. It is flattering and very useful.

new_world_explorer_ev_013.title: Abandoned Outpost
new_world_explorer_ev_013.body: A small outpost is deserted after several restless nights. The map suddenly folds inward.

new_world_explorer_ev_014.title: Island Market
new_world_explorer_ev_014.body: Merchants from the islands fill the port with rare goods and new profit opportunities.

new_world_explorer_ev_015.title: Forward Fort
new_world_explorer_ev_015.body: A small fort rises in a well-chosen place. The coast becomes easier to defend.

new_world_explorer_ev_016.title: Clumsy Zeal
new_world_explorer_ev_016.body: Men in too much of a hurry try to convince people by force of tone. They mostly earn mistrust.

new_world_explorer_ev_017.title: Kingdom Chest
new_world_explorer_ev_017.body: A chest arrives from the continent with supplies, orders, and a little confidence.

new_world_explorer_ev_018.title: Storm over the Holds
new_world_explorer_ev_018.body: A series of rains damages the stock. Part of the goods is lost.

new_world_explorer_ev_019.title: Shore School
new_world_explorer_ev_019.body: A school opens near the harbor. The children come for the words and return for the habits.

new_world_explorer_ev_020.title: Overly Optimistic Map
new_world_explorer_ev_020.body: An old map promises lands already disputed. The mistake costs time and presence.

new_world_explorer_ev_021.title: Rumor at Court
new_world_explorer_ev_021.body: A rumor of poor management reaches the court. The palace reacts badly.

new_world_explorer_ev_022.title: Spice Route
new_world_explorer_ev_022.body: A trade route finally becomes safe. Ships leave full and come back even more eager.

new_world_explorer_ev_023.title: Secured Bay
new_world_explorer_ev_023.body: The bay is better held, better watched, and much easier to claim.

new_world_explorer_ev_024.title: Offended Temple
new_world_explorer_ev_024.body: A sacred place is disturbed through clumsiness or pride. The doors close at once.

new_world_explorer_ev_025.title: Damp Warehouse
new_world_explorer_ev_025.body: Humidity spreads through the reserves. Part of the stock loses value before it is even sold.

new_world_explorer_ev_026.title: Mission Festival
new_world_explorer_ev_026.body: A great religious celebration gathers the harbor and several villages. The moment is well chosen and well managed.

new_world_explorer_ev_027.title: Shore Treaty
new_world_explorer_ev_027.body: A simple agreement finally settles who keeps what along the coast. It is less glorious than a flag, but far more solid.

new_world_explorer_ev_028.title: Displeased Envoy
new_world_explorer_ev_028.body: A royal envoy leaves with a closed face and a very full notebook. His report may harm us at court.

new_world_explorer_ev_029.title: Disappointing Mine
new_world_explorer_ev_029.body: The mine that was thought to be profitable is mainly producing losses and exhaustion.

new_world_explorer_ev_030.title: Week of Baptisms
new_world_explorer_ev_030.body: The mission enjoys a very busy week. Even the most cautious come to look more closely.
